title: keyring: NotFound/DecodeFailed returned for wrong reasons
description: secretx-keyring/src/lib.rs returns SecretError::DecodeFailed('keyring requires UTF-8 secret') when put() is called with non-UTF-8 bytes. DecodeFailed means 'a secret was fetched but could not be decoded'; here the operation never reached the backend at all. Should be SecretError::Backend or SecretError::Unavailable with a message like 'keyring backend requires UTF-8 secret values'. The same file also detects 'no keyring daemon' by string-matching error messages (is_no_storage()), which will break if the keyring crate changes its error messages.
